news.t: The Most Compelling ETF Launches in Q2
JP Morgan Adds Futures ETF to Lineup
J.P. Morgan Asset Management Launches JPMorgan Managed Futures Plus ETF (JPFP) on NYSE

overview.description: The JPMorgan Managed Futures Plus ETF (JPFP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in global macro alternatives. The fund is actively managed, seeking capital appreciation through OTC derivatives that provide both long and short exposure to commodities, currencies, equities, and fixed income. As part of the strategy, the fund also maintains a traditional US large-cap equity portfolio. JPFP was launched on May 27, 2026 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.
